text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Haaaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ――Special Week. A highly capable competitor whose greatest weapon is her explosive late charge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Watching her run alongside others in training is quite the spectacle. Many other trainers and Horsegirls besides myself have come to observe――

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Daaaaaaah!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Such incredible acceleration…!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hearing our voices overlap, I glance to the side and make eye contact with the Horsegirl standing next to me. If I remember correctly, her name is Buena Vista――

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah… Hehe, we ended up in unison there.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Spe's late charge is so cool, isn't it? No matter how many times I see it… my heart races.
choice_data_list: You really look up to her, huh?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: ――! Yes, very much so.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I… I admired Spe so much that I decided to aim for the Twinkle Series myself.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Her running is strong, yet warm at the same time. Beyond all that earnest running――lies a truly breathtaking "view."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I suppose you could say… I was captivated by that scenery. It made me want to run just like her――!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her expression as she says this is incredibly lively and joyful.
choice_data_list: <size=36>I guess today was a good learning experience</size>
<size=36>I guess today was a good learning experience</size>
<size=36>Since you're here, why not ask to run with her?</size>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her expression as she says this is incredibly lively and joyful.
choice_data_list: <size=36>I guess today was a good learning experience</size>
<size=36>I guess today was a good learning experience</size>
<size=36>Since you're here, why not ask to run with her?</size>

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yes! Every time I see her, my admiration just grows!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: It makes me want to reach the place Spe showed me that day even more…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: And someday, I want to be the one "showing" it to others. I want to use my own two legs to bring that same inspiration to someone else.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Hehe, I sounded a bit full of myself just now, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buena Vista's eyes sparkled as she spoke of her admiration for Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Eh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Watching her as she kept her eyes glued to Special Week's running, I could tell she looked a little antsy.
choice_data_list: It's making you want to run, isn't it?
It's making you want to run, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah…――Ehehe. Was it written all over my face?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Then maybe I'll go ask her… Thank you, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Speee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I quietly watched for a while as Buena Vista ran over and began chatting with Special Week.
